notes: Prototypicality family, next to concept-c2-inbegriff. This branch models Paradebeispiel as the textbook case that proves a general point.

de.definition: Ein besonders typischer Fall, der eine allgemeine Aussage perfekt belegt.
examples: Dieses Projekt zeigt mustergültig, wie gute Planung Kosten senkt.

en.definition: An especially typical case that perfectly proves a general point.
examples: This project is a prime example of how good planning cuts costs.

it.definition: Un caso particolarmente tipico che dimostra perfettamente un'affermazione generale.
examples: Questo progetto è un esempio lampante di come una buona pianificazione riduca i costi.

notes: Historical-break family. This branch models Zaesur as a sharp break that divides a development into a before and an after.

de.definition: Ein scharfer Einschnitt, der eine Entwicklung in ein Davor und ein Danach teilt.
examples: Der Mauerfall teilt die Geschichte der Stadt in ein Davor und ein Danach.

en.definition: A sharp break that divides a development into a before and an after.
examples: The fall of the wall marks a caesura in the city's history.

it.definition: Una frattura netta che divide uno sviluppo in un prima e un dopo.
examples: La caduta del muro segna una cesura nella storia della città.

notes: Argument-support family, next to concept-c1-fundiert. This branch models untermauern as backing a claim with evidence.

de.definition: Eine Behauptung mit Belegen oder Argumenten stützen.
examples: Sie stützt ihre These mit Zahlen aus drei unabhängigen Studien.

en.definition: To back a claim with evidence or arguments.
examples: She underpins her thesis with figures from three independent studies.

it.definition: Sostenere un'affermazione con prove o argomenti.
examples: Suffraga la sua tesi con dati di tre studi indipendenti.

notes: Argument-attack family, next to concept-c1-widerlegen. This branch models entkraeften as taking the force out of an argument without necessarily disproving it.

de.definition: Einem Argument oder Verdacht die Überzeugungskraft nehmen.
de.usage_note: Schwächer als widerlegen: das Gegenargument verliert sein Gewicht, muss aber nicht bewiesen falsch sein.
examples: Mit einem einzigen Beleg nimmt sie dem Verdacht jede Grundlage.

en.definition: To take the persuasive force out of an argument or suspicion.
examples: A single piece of evidence invalidated the suspicion.

it.definition: Togliere forza persuasiva a un argomento o a un sospetto.
examples: Una sola prova ha invalidato il sospetto.

notes: Reaffirmation family. This branch models bekraeftigen as emphatically confirming a statement or intention already made.

de.definition: Eine bereits gemachte Aussage oder Absicht nachdrücklich bestätigen.
examples: Die Ministerin bestätigt vor der Presse noch einmal nachdrücklich ihren Kurs.

en.definition: To confirm emphatically a statement or intention already made.
examples: The minister reaffirmed her course before the press.

it.definition: Confermare con forza un'affermazione o un'intenzione già espressa.
examples: La ministra ha ribadito la sua linea davanti alla stampa.

notes: Clarity family, next to concept-c1-verdeutlichen. This branch models veranschaulichen as making something abstract vivid with images or comparisons.

de.definition: Etwas Abstraktes durch Bilder oder Vergleiche anschaulich machen.
de.usage_note: Stärker bildhaft als verdeutlichen: es geht um das konkrete Vorstellbarmachen.
examples: Mit einem Alltagsvergleich macht der Professor die Theorie greifbar.

en.definition: To make something abstract vivid with images or comparisons.
examples: The professor illustrated the theory with an everyday comparison.

it.definition: Rendere vivido qualcosa di astratto con immagini o paragoni.
examples: Il professore ha illustrato la teoria con un paragone quotidiano.

notes: Outcome family. This branch models muenden (in + Akk.) as a development flowing into its final outcome; the river sense stays out of scope.

de.definition: Als Entwicklung schließlich in ein bestimmtes Ergebnis übergehen.
de.usage_note: Hier nur der übertragene Sinn mit in + Akkusativ, nicht der Fluss, der ins Meer fließt.
examples: Die monatelangen Proteste führen am Ende zu einer breiten Reform.

en.definition: To flow as a development into its final outcome.
examples: Months of protests culminated in a broad reform.

it.definition: Confluire, come sviluppo, nel proprio esito finale.
it.usage_note: Qui solo il senso figurato di sfociare in un risultato, non il fiume che sfocia nel mare.
examples: Mesi di proteste sono sfociati in un'ampia riforma.

notes: Formal-challenge family. This branch models anfechten as formally contesting a decision or contract, mainly the legal sense.

de.definition: Eine Entscheidung oder einen Vertrag auf offiziellem Weg für ungültig erklären lassen wollen.
examples: Die unterlegene Partei will das Urteil vor der nächsten Instanz angreifen.

en.definition: To formally challenge a decision or contract as invalid.
examples: The losing party wants to contest the ruling.

it.definition: Contestare formalmente una decisione o un contratto come non valido.
it.usage_note: Qui solo il senso giuridico, non impugnare un'arma o un attrezzo.
examples: La parte soccombente vuole impugnare la sentenza.

notes: Discretion family, next to concept-c1-spielraum. This branch models Ermessen as the authority to decide by one's own judgment within rules.

de.definition: Die Befugnis, innerhalb von Regeln nach eigenem Urteil zu entscheiden.
de.usage_note: Typisch: etwas liegt im eigenen Urteil einer Behörde oder Person.
examples: Ob die Gebühr erlassen wird, entscheidet die Behörde nach eigenem Urteil.

en.definition: The authority to decide by one's own judgment within rules.
examples: Waiving the fee is at the authority's discretion.

it.definition: Il potere di decidere secondo il proprio giudizio entro le regole.
examples: La riduzione della tariffa rientra nella discrezionalità dell'ente.

notes: Arbitrariness family, the negative counterpart of concept-c2-ermessen. This branch models Willkuer as decisions made without rules or justification.

de.definition: Entscheiden ohne Regeln, Maßstab oder Begründung, allein nach Laune.
examples: Die Strafen folgen keinem erkennbaren Maßstab, sondern der Laune des Chefs.

en.definition: Deciding without rules, standards, or justification, on mere whim.
examples: The fines follow no visible standard, only the boss's arbitrariness.

it.definition: Il decidere senza regole, criteri o giustificazioni, per puro capriccio.
examples: Le multe non seguono alcun criterio, solo l'arbitrarietà del capo.

notes: Persistence family, next to concept-b2-ausdauer. This branch models beharrlich as steadily sticking to a goal despite resistance.

de.definition: Trotz Widerstand ruhig und stetig am eigenen Ziel festhaltend.
examples: Trotz vieler Absagen verfolgt sie ihr Ziel Jahr für Jahr weiter.

en.definition: Steadily sticking to a goal despite resistance.
examples: Despite many rejections, she remained persistent year after year.

it.definition: Che persegue con costanza il proprio obiettivo nonostante le resistenze.
examples: Nonostante molti rifiuti, è rimasta tenace anno dopo anno.

notes: Persistence family, noun of concept-c2-beharrlich.

de.definition: Das ruhige, stetige Festhalten an einem Ziel trotz Widerstand.
examples: Ihr stilles Dranbleiben zahlt sich nach Jahren endlich aus.

en.definition: The steady holding on to a goal despite resistance.
examples: Her quiet tenacity finally paid off after years.

it.definition: Il perseverare con calma e costanza verso un obiettivo nonostante le resistenze.
examples: La sua tenacia silenziosa ha dato i suoi frutti dopo anni.

notes: Surprise family. This branch models verblueffend as so surprising that it briefly leaves one speechless.

de.definition: So überraschend, dass man einen Moment sprachlos ist.
examples: Die Ähnlichkeit der beiden Gemälde lässt die Besucher einen Moment sprachlos zurück.

en.definition: So surprising that it briefly leaves one speechless.
examples: The resemblance between the two paintings is astounding.

it.definition: Così sorprendente da lasciare per un attimo senza parole.
examples: La somiglianza tra i due dipinti è sbalorditiva.

notes: Recognizability family, next to concept-b2-eindeutig (which owns IT inequivocabile). This branch models unverkennbar as so characteristic it cannot be mistaken for anything else.

de.definition: So charakteristisch, dass man es mit nichts anderem verwechseln kann.
examples: Schon nach zwei Takten erkennt man ihre Handschrift in der Musik.

en.definition: So characteristic that it cannot be mistaken for anything else.
examples: Her style is unmistakable after just two bars of music.

it.definition: Così caratteristico da non poter essere confuso con nient'altro.
examples: Il suo stile è inconfondibile già dopo due battute.

notes: Fine-distinction family, next to concept-c2-subtil and concept-b2-subtilitat. This branch models Feinheit as a small but meaningful detail of a subject.

de.definition: Ein kleines, aber bedeutsames Detail einer Sache, das erst Kenner bemerken.
examples: Die kleinen Unterschiede der Grammatik lernt man erst nach Jahren.

en.definition: A small but meaningful detail of a subject, noticed only by experts.
examples: The fine points of the grammar take years to learn.

it.definition: Un dettaglio piccolo ma significativo di una materia, che solo gli esperti notano.
examples: Le finezze della grammatica si imparano solo dopo anni.

notes: Intuition family. This branch models Gespuer as a reliable instinctive feel for situations or people.

de.definition: Ein sicheres, instinktives Gefühl für Situationen oder Menschen.
examples: Sie merkt sofort, wann ein Kunde noch zögert.

en.definition: A reliable instinctive feel for situations or people.
examples: She has a fine intuition for when a customer is still hesitating.

it.definition: Un sicuro istinto per le situazioni o le persone.
it.usage_note: Qui solo il senso figurato di intuito, non l'olfatto degli animali.
examples: Ha un gran fiuto per capire quando un cliente esita ancora.

notes: Sophistication family. This branch models Raffinesse as refined, clever sophistication in design or execution.

de.definition: Ausgeklügelte, feine Durchdachtheit in Gestaltung oder Vorgehen.
examples: Das Menü besticht durch viele kleine, kluge Details.

en.definition: Refined, clever thoughtfulness in design or execution.
examples: The menu impresses with its quiet sophistication.

it.definition: Ricercatezza intelligente e curata nella forma o nell'esecuzione.
examples: Il menù colpisce per la sua discreta raffinatezza.

notes: Prototypicality family, adverb next to concept-c2-inbegriff. This branch models schlechthin as marking something as the purest instance of its kind.

de.definition: Nachgestellt: kennzeichnet etwas als das reinste Beispiel seiner Art.
de.usage_note: Steht nach dem Substantiv: das Beispiel einer Kategorie in Reinform.
examples: Für viele Fans ist dieses Stadion der Fußballtempel in Reinform.

en.definition: Placed after a noun: marks something as the purest example of its kind.
examples: For many fans, this stadium is the football temple par excellence.

it.definition: Posposto al nome: indica qualcosa come l'esempio più puro della sua categoria.
examples: Per molti tifosi questo stadio è il tempio del calcio per antonomasia.

notes: Hedging family, next to the B1 modal particles. This branch models gewissermassen as softening a bold or figurative formulation.

de.definition: Signalisiert, dass eine Formulierung bildlich oder nicht ganz wörtlich gemeint ist.
examples: Das Archiv ist, wenn man so will, das Gedächtnis der Stadt.

en.definition: Signals that a formulation is figurative or not entirely literal.
examples: The archive is, so to speak, the memory of the city.

it.definition: Segnala che una formulazione è figurata o non del tutto letterale.
examples: L'archivio è, per così dire, la memoria della città.

notes: Intensifier family. This branch models schlichtweg as bluntly intensifying a judgment with no qualification.

de.definition: Verstärkt ein Urteil ohne Einschränkung, oft bei klarer Ablehnung oder klarem Lob.
examples: Der Vorschlag ist ohne Wenn und Aber falsch.

en.definition: Bluntly intensifies a judgment with no qualification.
examples: The proposal is downright wrong.

it.definition: Intensifica un giudizio senza riserve.
examples: La proposta è decisamente sbagliata.
